words.definition_vi: củng cố, làm chắc chắn; gộp lại thành một khối; tập trung quyền lực/tài sản
words.definition_en: to strengthen or make more secure; to combine into one
words.example_sentence: The government consolidated its power by merging several agencies into a single ministry.

words.definition_vi: làm mòn, làm hủy hoại dần dần; suy yếu từng chút một (niềm tin, quyền lực)
words.definition_en: to gradually wear away or weaken; to destroy slowly
words.example_sentence: Constant criticism eroded public confidence in the institution over several years.

words.definition_vi: phát triển nhanh chóng, nảy nở; tăng trưởng mạnh mẽ
words.example_sentence: The burgeoning tech industry in Southeast Asia has attracted billions in foreign investment.

words.definition_vi: trì trệ, không phát triển; đình trệ; (nước) không chảy, ứ đọng
words.definition_en: showing no growth, development, or improvement; motionless
words.example_sentence: The stagnant economy forced policymakers to implement aggressive stimulus measures.

words.definition_vi: có tính trả thù, báo thù; mang tính trừng phạt hơn là công bằng
words.definition_en: seeking to harm someone in return for perceived injury; vengeful
words.example_sentence: The court ruled that the punitive damages were vindictive rather than compensatory.

words.definition_vi: cao thượng, hào phóng; rộng lượng, không tính toán nhỏ nhen
words.definition_en: generous and forgiving; noble in spirit
words.example_sentence: Despite his rival's harsh attacks, the leader remained magnanimous and offered reconciliation.

words.definition_vi: nhiệt tình, sôi nổi; đam mê sâu sắc; (cảm xúc) mãnh liệt
words.example_sentence: The fervid supporters of the movement organized rallies across the nation.

words.definition_vi: thờ ơ, vô cảm; không quan tâm, thiếu hứng thú
words.definition_en: lacking interest, enthusiasm, or concern; indifferent
words.example_sentence: The apathetic response from voters suggested declining trust in political institutions.

words.definition_vi: sắc sảo, nhạy bén; có tính thấu đáo, sâu sắc; (phê bình) chỉ trích sắc bén
words.definition_en: intelligently analytical and clear-thinking; sharp and penetrating
words.example_sentence: The journalist's incisive analysis of the scandal exposed systemic corruption.

words.definition_vi: bề ngoài, hời hợt; không sâu sắc, không đi vào bản chất; chỉ ở mặt ngoài
words.definition_en: existing or occurring on the surface; lacking depth or substance
words.example_sentence: The report provided only a superficial examination of the underlying causes.
